summary: Tested 6 bug fixes in Servex Holdings logistics platform. All features verified through backend API tests (5/5 pass) and frontend Playwright testing.
seed_data_creation: TEST_payment record created via record-payment API test (R 0.01 for House of Dodhia invoice)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working: (1) Finance tabs correct order Invoices|Client Statements|Trip Worksheets|Overdue|Payment History with default Invoices tab, (2) Payment History tab shows table with payment records, (3) Warehouse parcels display SX00000XXX (10-char) barcodes not UUIDs, (4) InvoiceEditor has 'Consolidate Identical' toggle button (data-testid=consolidate-items-toggle), (5) Scrollbar thumb CSS set to #3C3F42 with !important, (6) Settings CSV parser uses header-based detection. Backend APIs: system-export returns zip, GET /api/payments returns payment list with recorded_by_name, POST /api/invoices/{id}/record-payment works (not 405).

verified_features.finance_tabs_order: PASS - Invoices, Client Statements, Trip Worksheets, Overdue(0), Payment History
verified_features.payment_history_table: PASS - Shows table with payment records
verified_features.warehouse_barcode_format: PASS - All parcels show SX00000XXX format
verified_features.invoice_consolidate_toggle: PASS - Button visible in invoice editor
